name: After Hours Portfolio
rebalance_policy: Quarterly review; tactical mid-quarter changes when a position thesis changes materially. All rebalances logged with rationale in the issue dated to the change.

current_holdings.thesis: The most critical company in the AI build-out. Today's Computex reveal added two more revenue legs: PCs (RTX Spark) and humanoid robots (Isaac GR00T). Vera CPU now in full production.
Warren Buffett anchored an $80B equity raise at $351 with a $10B private placement. Quiet position-building since fall 2025. Cheapest mega-tech by P/E.
Every advanced AI chip is built here. No second source. Today's NVIDIA keynote validated TSMC 3nm across three product families.
HBM memory shortage structural through 2028. UBS tripled their PT to $1,625 last week. AI servers can't ship without it.
Google's custom AI silicon partner. Captures the non-NVIDIA segment of the cycle. Multi-generation TPU contracts.
Last quarter: AI server revenue +757% YoY. $51B order backlog. +33% Friday alone. Now extending into AI PCs.
Balanced exposure to all seven mega-techs. Hedge against picking the wrong horse among the individual mega-tech picks.
Power and cooling for AI data centers. Every NVDA rack needs it; nobody else does it at scale.
Raised full-year guidance by $5B in one quarter. Two AI roles in one company: custom silicon plus optical interconnect.
The invisible chip connecting GPUs to everything else in an AI rack. 76% gross margins.
AI cloud landlord. $99B in customer commitments. High debt — sizing reflects that.

cash_rationale: A 25% cash reserve is intentional. We're nine weekly closes into an S&P record streak (longest since 2023). Multiple late-cycle indicators are firing simultaneously. Cash is optionality — both a hedge if there's a pullback and dry powder to add on weakness.

history.note: Initial allocation. $100,000 notional. 11 individual positions + 1 ETF + 25% cash reserve.
